'''Renor''' was an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and location of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Supply Depot Port 27|supply depot]], where [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] attempted to meet with a [["Mouse" Temple|contact]], to gain transport to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], prior to being abducted by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Pel Talon]].<ref name="SM18.5" />
